entities.name: NON-LINEAR MODEL
entities.description: A mathematical model where the relationship between variables is not linear, used for parameter estimation when variables have errors.

entities.name: PARAMETER ESTIMATION
entities.description: The process of determining the parameters of a non-linear model given measured variables with random errors.

entities.name: RANDOM ERRORS
entities.description: The presence of random errors in both measured variables during the estimation process.

entities.name: MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATES
entities.description: A statistical method used to estimate the parameters of the non-linear model.

entities.name: ASYMPTOTIC VARIANCE AND COVARIANCE MATRIX
entities.description: A matrix presented alongside maximum likelihood estimates to describe the variance and covariance.
